docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY LUCAS, THOMAS ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT WELL FARGO BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2026 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-06-2026 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF THOMAS ANTHONY IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS AVID ALAVI. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TIFFANY WARD, BUSINESS EXECUTION CONSULTANT. THE DEFENDANT IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARACE. DEFENDANT REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE DUE TO SUDDEN ILLNESS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
